steps.title: Find the modifying phrase
steps.content: The blank comes after “US” and before the infinitive phrase “to have been led by a woman.” This phrase modifies the noun, so the noun must be a plural common noun that can be described as having been led by a woman.

steps.title: Apply the noun form rule
steps.content: Choice C gives “states and territories,” two plural nouns that fit the description and need no apostrophe. The other choices either incorrectly add apostrophes (making possessive forms) or mismatch singular/plural, which breaks the sentence. That matches choice C — C is correct.
